categories.name: أَحْدَاثُ يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ فِي سُورَةِ ٱلنَّبَإ
categories.nameEn: Events of the Day of Judgment in Surah An-Naba

items.verse: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَتَأْتُونَ أَفْوَاجًۭا
items.verseEn: The Day the Horn is blown and you will come forth in multitudes
And the heaven is opened and will become gateways.
And the mountains are removed and will be [but] a mirage.
Indeed, the Day of Judgement is an appointed time -

categories.name: مَوْصُوفَاتٌ بِالسَّبْعِ فِي الْقُرْآنِ
categories.nameEn: Things Described as 'Seven' in the Quran

items.verse: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍۢ وَثَمَـٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًۭا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍۢ
items.verseEn: Which He [i.e., Allāh] imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees.

items.verse: قَالَ تَزْرَعُونَ سَبْعَ سِنِينَ دَأَبًۭا فَمَا حَصَدتُّمْ فَذَرُوهُ فِى سُنۢبُلِهِۦٓ إِلَّا قَلِيلًۭا مِّمَّا تَأْكُلُونَ
items.verseEn: [Joseph] said, "You will plant for seven years consecutively; and what you harvest leave in its spikes, except a little from which you will eat.

items.verse: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا فَوْقَكُمْ سَبْعَ طَرَآئِقَ وَمَا كُنَّا عَنِ ٱلْخَلْقِ غَـٰفِلِينَ
items.verseEn: And We have created above you seven layered heavens, and never have We been of [Our] creation unaware.

items.verse: لَهَا سَبْعَةُ أَبْوَٰبٍۢ لِّكُلِّ بَابٍۢ مِّنْهُمْ جُزْءٌۭ مَّقْسُومٌ
items.verseEn: It has seven gates; for every gate is of them [i.e., Satan's followers] a portion designated."

categories.name: أَوْضَاعُ الصَّلَاةِ فِي الْقُرْآن
categories.nameEn: Postures of Prayer in the Quran

items.verse: فَإِذَا قَضَيْتُمُ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ فَٱذْكُرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ قِيَـٰمًۭا وَقُعُودًۭا وَعَلَىٰ جُنُوبِكُمْ ۚ فَإِذَا ٱطْمَأْنَنتُمْ فَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ ۚ إِنَّ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ كَانَتْ عَلَى ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ كِتَـٰبًۭا مَّوْقُوتًۭا
items.verseEn: And when you have completed the prayer, remember Allāh standing, sitting, or [lying] on your sides. But when you become secure, re-establish [regular] prayer. Indeed, prayer has been decreed upon the believers a decree of specified times.

items.verse: يَـٰمَرْيَمُ ٱقْنُتِى لِرَبِّكِ وَٱسْجُدِى وَٱرْكَعِى مَعَ ٱلرَّٰكِعِينَ
items.verseEn: O Mary, be devoutly obedient to your Lord and prostrate and bow with those who bow [in prayer]."

items.verse: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ عِندَ رَبِّكَ لَا يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ عَنْ عِبَادَتِهِۦ وَيُسَبِّحُونَهُۥ وَلَهُۥ يَسْجُدُونَ ۩
items.verseEn: Indeed, those who are near your Lord [i.e., the angels] are not prevented by arrogance from His worship, and they exalt Him, and to Him they prostrate.

items.verse: ٱلَّذِينَ يَذْكُرُونَ ٱللَّهَ قِيَـٰمًۭا وَقُعُودًۭا وَعَلَىٰ جُنُوبِهِمْ وَيَتَفَكَّرُونَ فِى خَلْقِ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ رَبَّنَا مَا خَلَقْتَ هَـٰذَا بَـٰطِلًۭا سُبْحَـٰنَكَ فَقِنَا عَذَابَ ٱلنَّارِ
items.verseEn: Who remember Allāh while standing or sitting or [lying] on their sides and give thought to the creation of the heavens and the earth, [saying], "Our Lord, You did not create this aimlessly; exalted are You [above such a thing]; then protect us from the punishment of the Fire.
Nor will I be a worshipper of what you worship.
From the evil of that which He created
Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind,

harf.hint: One of Allah's beautiful names describing His generous forgiveness
harf.arabicVerse: قُلْ أَنزَلَهُ ٱلَّذِى يَعْلَمُ ٱلسِّرَّ فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ غَفُورًۭا رَّحِيمًۭا
harf.verse: 25:6 - Say, [O Muḥammad], "It has been revealed by He who knows [every] secret within the heavens and the earth. Indeed, He is ever Forgiving and Merciful."

deduction.title: The Named One in the Prophet's Household
deduction.intro: In the household of the final messenger, there lived a soul whose personal story became a divine lesson for all believers. This figure's life was intimately connected to a transformative command that reshaped social customs forever, marking a profound shift in how faith would define family and belonging.
clues: My name was once linked to a noble lineage, but a higher truth would later clarify the true bonds of faith.
I was the recipient of great favor from Allah and His messenger, a favor that was publicly declared in the Book.
My marital life became a pivotal test that would forever change the perception of adopted relationships.
I was the one whose personal trial led to a divine command that allowed the Prophet to marry a woman after I departed.
Through my story, the distinction between biological and chosen family was made clear for all generations.
I am the only one among my peers whose name appears explicitly in the last revelation, not as a prophet, but as a servant tested and honored.

outcome.label: Outcome
options: The abolition of adoption as a means of creating blood relations
The establishment of the first Islamic state
outcome.answer: The abolition of adoption as a means of creating blood relations

deduction.arabic: وَإِذْ تَقُولُ لِلَّذِىٓ أَنْعَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَأَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِ أَمْسِكْ عَلَيْكَ زَوْجَكَ وَٱتَّقِ ٱللَّهَ وَتُخْفِى فِى نَفْسِكَ مَا ٱللَّهُ مُبْدِيهِ وَتَخْشَى ٱلنَّاسَ وَٱللَّهُ أَحَقُّ أَن تَخْشَىٰهُ ۖ فَلَمَّا قَضَىٰ زَيْدٌۭ مِّنْهَا وَطَرًۭا زَوَّجْنَـٰكَهَا لِكَىْ لَا يَكُونَ عَلَى ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ حَرَجٌۭ فِىٓ أَزْوَٰجِ أَدْعِيَآئِهِمْ إِذَا قَضَوْا۟ مِنْهُنَّ وَطَرًۭا ۚ وَكَانَ أَمْرُ ٱللَّهِ مَفْعُولًۭا
deduction.verse: And [remember, O Muḥammad], when you said to the one on whom Allāh bestowed favor and you bestowed favor, "Keep your wife and fear Allāh," while you concealed within yourself that which Allāh is to disclose. And you feared the people, while Allāh has more right that you fear Him. So when Zayd had no longer any need for her, We married her to you in order that there not be upon the believers any discomfort [i.e., guilt] concerning the wives of their claimed [i.e., adopted] sons when they no longer have need of them. And ever is the command [i.e., decree] of Allāh accomplished. (33:37)

scramble.hint: A prophet's warning to his people about disbelief and Allah's punishment - from the story of Noah, peace be upon him
scramble.verseEn: He said, "My Lord, indeed my people have denied me.
